title: Test result for a single CSAF test file
description: Representation of the expected result for a given test file from the test suite provided for section 6 of the specification.

result_t.title: Result
result_t.description: Contains the result for a given test.

id.title: Number of the test
id.description: Contains the section number of the test in the specification.

valid.title: Valid
valid.description: States whether the data passed the test.

validation_message_t.title: Validation message
validation_message_t.description: Contains a message and the instance path it occurred.

instance_path.title: Instance path
instance_path.description: Contains a JSON pointer detailing the path to the instance that raised the issue.

message.title: Message
message.description: Contains the message detailing what the issues is.

validation_messages_t.title: Validation messages
validation_messages_t.description: Contains a list of validation messages.

$schema.title: JSON schema
$schema.description: Contains the URL of the JSON schema for test result which the document promises to be valid for.

overall_valid.title: Overall valid
overall_valid.description: States whether the file passes all basic tests.

primary_result.title: Primary result
primary_result.description: Contains the expected result for this test.

resultschema_version.title: Result version
resultschema_version.description: Contains the current version of this schema

secondary_results.title: Secondary results
secondary_results.description: Contains a list of expected result for other tests.
